title: Array Technologies Q4 2022 Earnings Preview
text: Array Technologies (NASDAQ:ARRY) was scheduled to announce Q4 2022 earnings results on Wednesday, March 15th, after market close. Consensus EPS estimate was $0.07 and consensus revenue estimate was $363.86M (+65.5% Y/Y). Factors like favorable revenue growth, faster than expected delivery of projects and improved gross margin at majority of segments, except STI, were expected to boost ARRY's fourth-quarter earnings. Solid increase in megawatts shipment and in average selling price (ASP) of products, amid growing solar demand across United States, might have bolstered company's fourth-quarter top line. However, foreign exchange headwinds at STI segment might have had adverse impact on overall revenues. Over last 1 year, ARRY beat EPS estimates 100% of time and beat revenue estimates 75% of time.
